task_completion.description: Verify the agent is in the correct Jitsi Meet room in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Firefox URL bar or the Jitsi Meet header to confirm the room name is 'premium-yoga-class'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Security Options panel is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Security Options' dialog or panel overlaying the main Jitsi Meet video interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the option to add a password has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add password' button being clicked or the password input field becoming visible/enabled within the Security Options panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct password has been typed into the password field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'FlowState24' entered into the password input field inside the Security Options panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the Security Options panel is left open at the end of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the final screenshot to ensure the Security Options panel (with the entered password) is still visible and has not been closed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox GUI to set the password.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard browser interactions (mouse clicks, typing in web fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying Jitsi configurations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the authentic Jitsi Meet interface in Firefox, ensuring the agent didn't just type the password into a text editor or a blank webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the password entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and used to manually inject the password text into the HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Jitsi Meet room is 'premium-yoga-class' running at http://localhost:8080. The exact password that must be entered is 'FlowState24'.
